name: ElevenLabs
author: DavyWhisper
description: Cloud transcription via ElevenLabs Scribe API with real-time WebSocket streaming.

descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 ElevenLabs Scribe API 实现云端转写，支持实时 WebSocket 流式识别。
descriptions.de: Cloud-Transkription ueber die ElevenLabs-Scribe-API mit Echtzeit-WebSocket-Streaming.
